name: xcpConnect
title: xcpConnect
description: Establishes a connection to the XCP/CCP device and starts the configured DAQ measurement.
If the connection is successfully depends on the response of the device.
Use xcpIsConnected to be aware of the connection.
After establishing the connection and before start of the DAQ measurement the callback function OnXcpConnect is called.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Name of the device – configured within the CANoeXCP/CCP Window.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
